## Tags
password, key, refresh, change

## Categories
security, account

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/rotate-ccw-key)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::RotateCcwKey;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        RotateCcwKey { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
